rows.label: qev040406_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh my, are my children
off on an adventure-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040406_MSG0002
rows.name:
Finding Nopon in the Nightglow
Forest is very difficult-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040406_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's not often that they get
caught or eaten, so I don't
really think it's dangerous-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040406_MSG0004
rows.name:
...I wonder why Tatsu
got caught though-mo...[ST:wait ]
